title: Butternut Squash
description: Silky butternut squash infused with rosemary butter, cream, and a hint of nutmeg. A warming, elegant side dish.

steps.instruction: Peel, seed, and cube the butternut squash into 1-inch pieces.
Steam or boil squash for 20–25 minutes until very soft and easily pierced with a fork.
While squash cooks, melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat. Add the rosemary sprig and gently warm for 5 minutes to infuse. Remove and discard the rosemary sprig.
Drain cooked squash. Transfer to blender with rosemary-infused butter and heavy cream.
Add nutmeg, salt, and white pepper.
Blend on high for 60–90 seconds until completely smooth and silky.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve warm.

notes: Infusing flavor through butter is a great technique — it gives you all the rosemary flavor without any herb pieces to chew through.
